title: Motion to Lift a Closure Order
content: A motion to lift a closure order which has already been implemented may be entertained only when filed with the Licensing and Regulation Office (LRO) within ten (10) calendar days from the date of implementation. The motion shall be verified and shall clearly state the grounds upon which it is based, attaching supporting documents. A motion to lift which does not conform to the requirements herein set forth shall be denied.

metadata.source_file: Omnibus IRR of RA 8042 as amended by RA 10022.pdf
